name: labflow
description: Codex-native research coding skill toolbox with codebase research, external research, design scaffolding, handoff, Obsidian, PDF, and MCP support.

interface.longDescription: Labflow is a Codex skill toolbox for research coding: local codebase research, external evidence gathering, idea-to-scaffold design work, engineering handoff, research-friendly annotation, pseudocode drafting, Obsidian CLI operations, PDF reading, and read-heavy background agents.
defaultPrompt: Use codebase-research to investigate the camera configuration pipeline.
Use external-research to check the official API behavior for this library version.
Use design-scaffold to turn this idea into reviewable interfaces, fields, and TODO anchors.
Use engineering-handoff to update vault=Research path=_progress.md.
